name: Ashley Kroetsch, HillaryClinton.com
subject: There's only one way we win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/servlet/MailView?ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0).

With you. | Friends --

Hillary is our presumptive nominee because of you -- from calls to donations, your support has brought us to this point. But now the stakes are even higher.

Voters have a choice in November that will affect all of us. We need your help, and your calls, to make sure that choice is clear. We can't talk to everyone we need to before Election Day without you, and we're already running out of time.

[**Can you make 25 calls to Hillary supporters this weekend and invite them to join you in making calls?**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Trump's dangerous rhetoric continues to divide Americans and our allies. Hillary knows we are stronger when we work together, and has the experience to bring everyone to the table to break down barriers, not build walls.

Calls like these are statistically-proven to increase voter turnout. If we're going to reach all of the voters necessary to help Hillary win in November, we're going to need more help, full stop.

For priority lists of volunteers we need to reach this week to stay on track to win, visit:

[**https://www.hillaryclinton.com/calls**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

All in,

Ashley

[**P.S. Already on board and ready for what's next? Claim your Call Captain spot now!**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) [****](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU4MzIyNjAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIzODQ4MTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Hamilton
body:
Will I see you at the theater? | Friend --

When I first saw the musical _Hamilton_ last year, I was blown away. It’s an incredible feat of storytelling about the fight for the heart and soul of our very nation. It’s a look at history that feels immediately relevant today. It’s a beautiful piece of art with empathy to spare.

So I want you to experience a performance with me next month. **[Will you add your name to be entered for the chance to be my guest?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

You can bring a friend -- and don’t worry about the cost of tickets or flights. The campaign will cover it, so you can focus on enjoying the show!

**Enter now, and I might see you at the theater!**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

|
**Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary and Democrats down the ticket -- and be automatically entered to meet her at a performance of _Hamilton_ :**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

******No purchase, payment, contribution, or signing up to receive texts is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 6/17/16 at 12:00 a.m. (all times Eastern) and 6/30/16 at 11:59 p.m. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate, or enter by texting HAMILTON to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free without contributing or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Hamilton in New York City as well as round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the New York City area and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest (approximate retail value of Prizes: $3500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185-5256.

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)** Paid for by Hillary Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Hillary for America, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AR, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, IA, KS, KY, LA, ME, MA, MI, MN, MS, MO, MT, NV, NH, NJ, NM, NC, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, WV, WI, and WY.

**Contributions or gifts to Hillary Victory Fund are not tax deductible.** This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 1366, Merrifield, VA 22116-9559 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU4MzM5NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzODkzMzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Josh Wolf
subject: bad news: new Super PAC attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c1d/738133e4/367b7b31/7f828019/490850120/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160625?refcode=pme160625_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
There are a few things you can always count on in statewide elections in Florida, folks: the stakes will be high, the margins will be razor-thin, and getting your message out will be expensive.
But get this: according to _Rothenberg_ , our race will not only be one of the "most important" \-- it could be "one of the most expensive in history" too. And now we're facing off against Marco Rubio!

[**Our end of quarter deadline is coming up fast, and we have a big $150,000 goal to meet. Will you donate now to win back Rubio 's seat from him and help us turn the Senate blue?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c1d/738133e4/367b7b31/7f828019/490850120/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160625?refcode=pme160625_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

The day after Marco Rubio flip-flopped into running for Senate again, a new super PAC launched to support him. Their debut? An "ad that savages a Democratic opponent, U.S. Rep. Patrick Murphy."

**If we don 't fight back, things could go downhill quick. **We don't need to match their dark money sums, but we do need your grassroots support. And fast.

[**Please step up and chip in right now towards our huge end of quarter goal. Together, we can defeat Rubio and win back the Senate for Democrats.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c1d/738133e4/367b7b31/7f828019/490850120/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160625?refcode=pme160625_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thank you,

Josh Wolf
| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c1d/738133e4/367b7b31/7f82801a/490850120/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c1d/738133e4/367b7b31/7f82801b/490850120/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: historic week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

It's been a historic week, friend.

Doing nothing in the face of the continued toll of gun violence makes Congress complicit in the ongoing carnage in our communities. The American people have had enough and so have Congressional Democrats. That's why we staged a sit-in to demand a vote on commonsense gun reform measures that are supported by over 90% of the American public. Unfortunately House Republicans are intent on doing the bidding of the NRA --instead of holding a vote they ran out of town in the middle of the night.

They can run but they cannot hide on this issue. My opponent has been the NRA's go-to person in Annapolis. She even voted against the Maryland ban on semi automatic weapons. There's no question whose side she will be on in the U.S. Senate. And those groups are ready to fight hard for her -- in fact they have been working to fill her campaign war chest for months.

**[Friend, can you please chip in so my team has the resources to stay ahead of my Republican opponent and make sure we win this November?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91da7/70cdc2ba/47f28132/3973dfb/506569128/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?refcode=em062516&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMEFriend+can+you+please+chip+in+s&utm_campaign=em062516&source=em062516")**

There are less than 20 weeks to Election Day and this upcoming Federal Election Deadline on Thursday is our first big test.

**[Can you help us send a strong message to the GOP by showing we have the resources to respond to their SuperPAC attacks?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91da7/70cdc2ba/47f28132/3973df8/506569128/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?refcode=em062516&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+help+us+send+a+strong+message+to&utm_campaign=em062516&source=em062516")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91da7/70cdc2ba/47f28132/3973df9/506569128/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em062516&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+5+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em062516&source=em062516")** **[Donate $15 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91da7/70cdc2ba/47f28132/3973df6/506569128/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em062516&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+15+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em062516&source=em062516")** **[Donate $35 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91da7/70cdc2ba/47f28132/3973df7/506569128/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=em062516&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+35+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em062516&source=em062516")** **[Donate $75 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91da7/70cdc2ba/47f28132/3973df4/506569128/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=em062516&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Donate+75+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em062516&source=em062516")** **[Donate $125 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91da7/70cdc2ba/47f28132/3973df5/506569128/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?express_lane=true&amount=125&refcode=em062516&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Donate+125+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em062516&source=em062516")** **[Or, donate another amount to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91da7/70cdc2ba/47f28132/3973df2/506569128/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?refcode=em062516&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount+to+stand+with+C&utm_campaign=em062516&source=em062516")** Thanks again for all your support this past week and always. It means a lot to know we are in this fight together.

Chris
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91da7/70cdc2ba/47f28132/3973df3/506569128/VEsP/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em062516&source=em062516") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Your shot to see Hamilton for FREE:
body:
Your chance to see Hamilton with Hillary: | Friend --

Did you see the HUGE news?
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Just that Hillary wants you to be her guest at _Hamilton_ on BROADWAY! [**All you have to do is add your name for a chance to win a free trip for you and a guest to meet Hillary and see the show in New York City.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
RIGHT? SO EXCITING!

Now, just in case you’re not familiar with the awesomeness that is _Hamilton_ , we’re gonna let Michelle Obama break it down for you:

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
That’s exactly right -- so what better way to see it than with the woman who could be our next president?!

**Don’t throw away your shot to be in the room where it happens -- add your name right now, and you and a guest might win a trip to New York, great seats to see _Hamilton_ , and time to meet Hillary at the show:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Good luck!

\--Your pals at Hillary for America

|
**Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary and Democrats down the ticket -- and be automatically entered to meet her at a performance of _Hamilton_ :**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

******No purchase, payment, contribution, or signing up to receive texts is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 6/17/16 at 12:00 a.m. (all times Eastern) and 6/30/16 at 11:59 p.m. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate, or enter by texting HAMILTON to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free without contributing or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Hamilton in New York City as well as round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the New York City area and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest (approximate retail value of Prizes: $3500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185-5256.

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)** Paid for by Hillary Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Hillary for America, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AR, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, IA, KS, KY, LA, ME, MA, MI, MN, MS, MO, MT, NV, NH, NJ, NM, NC, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, WV, WI, and WY.

**Contributions or gifts to Hillary Victory Fund are not tax deductible.** This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 1366, Merrifield, VA 22116-9559 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU4MzQ1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTIwNTA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
